questions.question_text: Which of the following structure is most expected for the molecule XeOF4?

questions.question_text: XeF6 dissolves in anhydrous HF to give a good conducting solution which contains:

questions.question_text: Which of the following is an uncommon hydrolysis product of XeF2 and XeF4?

questions.option_c: Both are example of non-redox reaction

questions.question_text: Which of the following noble gas does not form clathrate compound?

questions.option_b: Amongst anions NO3-, SO3 2-, CO3 2- and BO3 3- only SO3 2- have p pi - d pi bonding.
questions.option_c: Amongst anions SO3 2-, SO4 2-, S2O4 2- and HSO4-, SO3 2- is basic and reducing in nature.
questions.option_d: Number of lone pair(s) of electrons on Xe atoms in XeF2, XeF4 and XeF6 are 3, 2 and 1 respectively.
